name: Fighting
description:
You will learn how to fight now. In the room, there is a monster called
Astrain. You have already seen it when you first came to this room. Anyway, 
type 'look' to examine the room. You will notice that there is a
monster called Astrain in this room.
Before fighting, type 'wimpy 5'. This way, you will run if your hp
(hit points) is below 5. This 'wimpy' is very useful to avoid deaths.
If you are ready to fight, type 'kill astrain' or 'k a'.
Type 'u' to continue.
